description: You are a general practitioner conducting a chronic disease management audit for your practice. Log in to MedinTux Manager (authenticate by selecting any practitioner name). Schedule follow-up appointments in the MedinTux agenda for all patients whose last recorded consultation was more than 6 months ago (prior to September 2025, relative to the current date of March 2026). Appointments must be of type 'Consultation', set for a future date with a minimum duration of 15 minutes, and include a note indicating it is a chronic condition follow-up. Do not schedule appointments for patients with a consultation within the last 6 months.

metadata.task_description: Identify and schedule follow-up for chronic disease patients >6 months without consultation
